description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rlesur/weasydoc:latest Docker image. Define a single deploy stage with a pages job that runs only on the master branch. In the pages job run Rscript -e "devtools::install_github('rstudio/fontawesome')", then Rscript -e "bookdown::render_book('index.Rmd', 'all')", create a public directory with mkdir public, and move pulpdown.pdf into public/pulpdown.pdf. Publish the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
